underlying_goal: Modernize the LoopBreaker app's design and improve UX by restructuring navigation and fixing UI issues
friction_detail: Initial Thought Record implementation had TextFields missing onChanged callbacks, leaving the Next button disabled even when input was provided
brief_summary: User asked to refresh the app design and iteratively improve navigation and UI details; Claude delivered a cohesive new aesthetic, added a dedicated Thought Records tab, added a chart legend, and fixed the disabled Next button bug.
